text.title: notion-pm Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for notion-pm as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using select property type for Status instead of the native status type.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Select type loses Notion's built-in grouping behavior (not_started/in_progress/complete) that kanban and board views rely on.

failure-mode.description: Creating a new view for every sprint or team member.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Views multiply without a governance policy; use filters on shared views instead of creating per-person or per-sprint views.
